title: 10 Herbal Teas For Osteoporosis
description: Angelica sinensis teas contains bioactive constituents like ferulic acid and polysaccharides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties are helpful in reducing bone resorption and promoting bone formation, which can lead to improved bone density. The tea also contains angelica acid and ligustilide, which have been found to stimulate the production of osteoblasts, the cells responsible for bone growth. Additionally, the tea's ferulic ac...
